scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited theme feedback integration adds GameBoardFeedbackProfile as one intentional project runtime script class. A complete 286-test run retained the reviewed Godot 4.7/GUT shutdown counts exactly: ObjectDB 301, Resources 129, and RID allocations 11/9/5. Only the project runtime class-set fingerprint changes; all shutdown limits remain unchanged.
